tasks.subject: Task 0: dto.SourceStatus + platform.Registry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Shared status value type + thread-safe registry with transition-notifier.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/platform/ -run TestRegistry -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/source_status.go","daemon/platform/registry.go","daemon/platform/registry_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/platform/ -run TestRegistry -v"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: platform Detector + Resolver + validators
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Version detection, capability probing, path/binary existence, shape-validation helpers; platform imports only dto+logger+stdlib.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/platform/ -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/platform/detector.go","daemon/platform/resolver.go","daemon/platform/validate.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/platform/ -v"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire registry into context/orchestrator + WS topic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Registry on domain.Context, created in main.go, seeded by detector via daemon/services/probes.go, notifier publishes TopicSourceStatusChanged broadcast over WS.

**Verify:** go build ./... && go test ./daemon/... -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/domain/context.go","main.go","daemon/services/orchestrator.go","daemon/constants/topics.go","daemon/services/probes.go","daemon/services/api/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "go build ./... && go test ./daemon/... -count=1"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Validate+report in system & array collectors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** system+array collectors validate, report status, publish best-effort, attach inline source_status when not healthy.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -run TestValidate -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/collectors/validators.go","daemon/services/collectors/system.go","daemon/services/collectors/array.go","daemon/dto/system.go","daemon/dto/array.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -run TestValidate -v"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Validate+report in disk & shares collectors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** disk (disks.ini/smartctl) + shares (shares.ini) resilience pattern + inline flags.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/collectors/disk.go","daemon/services/collectors/shares.go","daemon/dto/disk.go","daemon/dto/share.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -v"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Validate+report in docker & vm collectors [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docker+vm resilience pattern, then first on-hardware verify.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after acceptance criteria re-validated on Unraid with output captured.

**Verify:** go test ./... && ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/collectors/docker.go","daemon/services/collectors/vm.go","daemon/dto/container.go","daemon/dto/vm.go"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "this-step"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Capability-gate array/disk/docker/vm controllers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Control ops check capability before acting; return clear unavailable errors.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/controllers/guard.go","daemon/services/controllers/array.go","daemon/services/controllers/docker.go","daemon/services/controllers/vm.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/controllers/ -v"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: REST /diagnostics/self-test + health summary [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** REST self-test endpoint + health-report degraded summary; verified healthy on hardware.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after live self-test overall_state healthy on 192.168.20.21.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/api/ -run TestSelfTest -v && ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/api/diagnostics.go","daemon/services/api/server.go","daemon/services/api/handlers.go","ansible/roles/verify/tasks/main.yml"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "this-step"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: run_self_test MCP tool + Prometheus gauges
tasks.description:
**Goal:** run_self_test MCP tool (122 tools) + unraid_subsystem_status / unraid_degraded_subsystem_count gauges.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ ./daemon/services/api/ -count=1

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/mcp/server.go","daemon/services/api/metrics.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test ./daemon/services/mcp/ ./daemon/services/api/ -count=1"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Auto-alert subsystem_degraded [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** AlertEnv.DegradedSubsystemCount + built-in enabled subsystem_degraded rule; verified by induced degradation on hardware.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after induced degradation fires the alert on the live server and resolves on recovery.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/alerting/ -v + live induce → /api/v1/alerts/firing

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/dto/alert.go","daemon/services/alerting/templates.go"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "this-step"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Fixtures + breakage tests + docs + final verify + CHANGELOG [USER-GATE]
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sanitized fixtures + crux breakage tests + docs (122 tools) + final hardware verify + CodeRabbit, THEN CHANGELOG last.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** CHANGELOG is the LAST action, only after full hardware verify + clean CodeRabbit.

**Verify:** go test ./daemon/services/collectors/ -run TestFixtures -v && final ansible-playbook ... --tags build,deploy,verify

```json:metadata
{"files": ["daemon/services/collectors/fixtures_test.go","docs/integrations/mcp.md","AGENTS.md","CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "ansible-playbook -i ansible/inventory.yml ansible/deploy.yml --tags build,deploy,verify", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "whole-plan"}
```
